description: Example only. Adapt this to the real /root/.openclaw/openclaw.json or agent tool format on the cloud host.

tools.name: query_tree_profile
tools.description: Fetch a tree profile, current assessment, and bounded recent timeline evidence.

tools.name: query_tree_timeline
tools.description: Fetch UAV coordinate history for one tree.

tools.name: query_plantation_report
tools.description: Fetch plantation dashboard and block report summaries.

tools.name: query_missing_evidence
tools.description: List missing evidence dimensions and recommended capture actions for one tree.

tools.name: explain_prediction
tools.description: Explain a mock prediction deterministically without claiming diagnosis.

tools.name: generate_patrol_report
tools.description: Return priority trees for field patrol.
